content: I am a graduate student at NYU Tandon School specialising in Cybersecurity. My research interests are Cryptography, Application Security, Network Security. I have worked in software development and application security for Oracle FSGBU. Currently I work as an intern at Tag Cyber LLC.

title: Sourajyoti Bose

content:
I will use this page to track my study for CEH. I have chosen March 15th as the date of my exam. This post will contain to-do lists and materials that I have used to study for it.
Todo Lists Topics
Ethical hacking fundamentals Reconnaisance and footprinting Scanning and enumeration Sniffing and Evasion Attacking a System Hacking web servers and applications Wireless network hacking Mobile and IoT Security in cloud computing Trojans and other attacks Cryptography
